title: caladenia × idiastes
intro: Caladenia × idiastes is a hybrid orchid species, specifically a cross between Caladenia carphoglossa and Caladenia flava. This plant is native to Western Australia and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its various health benefits. The medicinal properties of Caladenia × idiastes include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which are believed to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, wounds, and infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in infusions or teas, and also as a tincture, to harness its health benefits, including reducing fever and promoting overall well-being.
